skills.description: List of skills to get recommendations for

skill.description: The skill or topic you want to learn
skill.validation: Must be at least 1 character long and not whitespace-only

preferences.description: Career goals, learning styles, time commitments, or technologies

max_results.description: Maximum number of recommendations per skill

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for content filtering
language.validation: Must be a valid ISO 639-1 code

response_structure.results: Array of SkillRecommendationResult objects, one per requested skill

SkillRecommendationResult.skill: The skill that was searched for
SkillRecommendationResult.total_results: Number of recommendations returned for this skill

career_goals.description: Target job roles or career paths

time_commitment.description: Desired content length or time investment
